diagrams.title: Ethernet Frame Structure
diagrams.description: Complete Ethernet frame showing all fields from Preamble to FCS with byte sizes
diagrams.purpose: Understand frame composition and minimum/maximum sizes

diagrams.title: CSMA/CD Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process showing carrier sense, transmission, collision detection, and backoff
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how Ethernet handles shared media access and collisions

diagrams.title: Hub vs Switch Topology
diagrams.description: Comparison showing hub as single collision domain vs switch with separate collision domains per port
elements: Hub diagram: all computers connected to center hub, one broadcast domain
Switch diagram: each computer to individual switch port, separate collision domains
diagrams.purpose: Understand why switches are preferred over hubs in modern networks

diagrams.title: VLAN Tagging (802.1Q)
diagrams.description: Shows original and tagged Ethernet frame with VLAN tag insertion between Source MAC and Type/Length
diagrams.purpose: Understand VLAN segmentation and frame tagging mechanism
